items.title: Hungarians vote in big numbers on whether to end Orbán rule and elect rival
items.summary: Most polls favour Péter Magyar, who fronts a grassroots party, and early figures point to a record turnout of voters.

items.title: 'We need real peace': Easter truce fails to lift grim mood in war-torn Ukraine
items.summary: Easter festivities are muted in Kharkiv as Ukrainians expect fighting to flare up again after a weekend truce.

items.title: Asha Bhosle: The sound of Bollywood dies aged 92
items.summary: Her infectious voice got fans dancing and singing, becoming the soundtrack for generations of Indians.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 中國網友氣炸！奧迪駕駛加油3千元 沒付帳就直接開走
items.summary: 太離譜！中國安徽省合肥市1輛奧迪轎車，11日下午1時許到加油站加了632人民幣（約新台幣2938元）的汽油，孰料駕駛沒付錢就直接開走，雖然員工急得從後追趕但只能眼睜睜地看著車輛駛...…

items.title: 全球密切關注美伊戰爭  中國南海填海造陸可見50棟建物、停機坪
items.summary: 全球目光集中於中東局勢之際，衛星影像顯示，中國正於南海西沙群島一處礁體進行填海造陸，短時間內已形成大面積新土地，相關變化持續受到關注。  根據《富比世》（Forbes）報導...…

items.title: 美紐澤西州速食店驚傳槍響 至少6人中彈
items.summary: 美國紐澤西州尤寧（Union）的速食店Chick-fil-A，於當地時間11日晚間8時45分許發生槍擊案，目前傳出至少有6人中彈，警方正在調查中。  據《福斯新聞》報導，槍擊...…
